_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Zumble FiveM
author: deputyryan32@gmail.com
description: Standalone Mumble voice server for FiveM using Zumble with HTTP API and CitizenFX client restriction.
startup: if [ "${ENABLE_TLS}" = "true" ]; then ./rust-mumble --listen ${LISTEN} --http-listen ${HTTP_LISTEN} --http-user ${HTTP_USER} --http-password ${HTTP_PASSWORD} --cert ${CERT} --key ${KEY} --restrict-to-version CitizenFX --http-log; else ./rust-mumble --listen ${LISTEN} --http-listen ${HTTP_LISTEN} --http-user ${HTTP_USER} --http-password ${HTTP_PASSWORD} --restrict-to-version CitizenFX --http-log; fi

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /mnt/server || exit 1

echo "Fetching latest Zumble release..."

LATEST=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/AvarianKnight/rust-mumble/releases/latest \
| grep browser_download_url \
| grep linux-musl.zip\" \
| grep -v sha256 \
| cut -d '"' -f 4)

if [ -z "$LATEST" ]; then
  echo "Failed to fetch latest release."
  exit 1
fi

echo "Downloading: $LATEST"

curl -fL -o zumble.zip "$LATEST" || exit 1

echo "Extracting..."

apt update -y >/dev/null 2>&1
apt install -y unzip >/dev/null 2>&1

unzip -o zumble.zip || exit 1

chmod +x rust-mumble

rm -f zumble.zip

echo "Zumble installed."
